summary: Audience‑only tape mislabeled as soundboard; loud crowd overwhelms a decent show
review: Both reviewers note that the recording is not a soundboard but an audience tape with a very loud crowd, making the audio hard to enjoy. They do mention the concert itself was a "great show," but the mislabeling and poor sonic clarity dominate their criticism.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 1‑star ratings, focusing on the faulty labeling and noisy audience; while they praise the performance, the recording issues drive the overall rating down.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Loud audience bleed throughout; misidentified as a soundboard (SBD) leading to disappointment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply call it a "great show" without detailing songs.
